mapper.sql: a.id ,uuid ,plan_code ,plan_name ,plan_name_smt ,mno ,host ,GET_COMPANY_NM(host) hostNm ,plan_type ,sup_data_val ,sup_qos ,sup_call_val ,sup_sms_val ,normal_price ,sale_price ,after_price ,promotion_period ,promotion_period_val ,combination_enable ,benefit ,freebies ,link_url ,url_smt ,business_name ,etc ,sale_status ,disp_yn ,new_yn ,image_badge_special ,image_badge_it_comb ,image_badge_add_data ,image_badge_add_data_nm ,image_badge_simple_open ,supp_content ,no_supp_content ,event_banner_image_pc ,event_banner_image_mo ,event_banner_image_url ,event_banner_image_target ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,a.point_plan_yn ,a.m12_price ,a.m24_price ,IFNULL(a.sup_call_buga_val, '') as sup_call_buga_val ,(a.sup_qos / 1024) AS int_qos ,a.daily_data ,(select max(logo_img) from tb_mbm_company_list where id = a.host) planLogoImg ,(select count(1) from tb_pmb_plan_zzim where prod_id = a.id) planZzimCnt ,(select count(1) from tb_pmb_plan_req_mng where req_prod = a.id) planReqCnt ,(select count(1) from tb_pmb_plan_zzim where prod_id = a.id and user_mng_id =#{userMngId} ) planLoginUserZzimCnt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_zzim b ON b.prod_id = a.id WHERE sale_status = 1 AND disp_yn = 1 AND user_mng_id = #{userMngId} LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}

SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_zzim b ON b.prod_id = a.id WHERE sale_status = 1 AND disp_yn = 1 AND a.id IN
#{planid}
